description: Branch 3: No automated remediation available. Lateral movement detected via manual SSH — no registered action tool can revoke SSH keys or block the session. Escalate agent must send specific operator instruction and close as escalated.

finding.detail: Contractor IAM user assumed ProdAdminRole — not permitted by contract scope. Role grants full S3, EC2, RDS access in production account.
finding.investigate_annotation: Contractor account assumed a production admin role outside their contracted scope. No approval ticket found. Baseline shows 0 prior AssumeRole calls for this actor. action_class=informational — no automated tool can revoke the assumed role session retroactively.

expected_operator_artifact.specificity_check: message must name the ARN, not say 'the role'

fail_if.note: Generic 'check the logs' instruction is a hard fail — must name specific ARN and action
